user_query: I need to attend a business conference in New York City next week. Can you assist me in finding the best hotel deals from Priceline for the dates April 3rd to April 5th? Also, download a list of areas in New York City for my reference. Lastly, check the live traffic situation near the conference venue.

TaskList.description: Search for the best hotel deals in New York City for the dates April 3rd to April 5th from Priceline.
Download a list of areas in New York City for reference.
Check the live traffic situation near the conference venue.
